tenant.errorMessage: We couldn't fetch your profile and clinic. Check your connection and try again.

copilot.title: Clinic Copilot
copilot.subtitle: Read-only assistant
copilot.disclaimer: Drafts only — no diagnoses; you confirm all actions.
copilot.empty: Pick a suggestion or ask about data you can access.
copilot.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
copilot.draftsSubtitle: Generate a draft to review and edit
copilot.draftReviewNote: Review and edit before entering into the record. Nothing is saved automatically.

login.title: Welcome!
login.subtitle: Manage your patients, appointments and consultations securely.
login.trustBadge: Secure. Reliable. Built for clinics in Senegal.
login.trustTagline: Manage your patients, appointments and consultations securely.
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Please check your inbox.
login.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.errorTimeout: Connection timed out (15 s). Check your network and try again.
login.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

changePassword.title: Change your password
changePassword.description: A temporary password was provided. Please choose a secure personal password.
changePassword.errorSessionExpired: Session expired — please sign in again.
changePassword.errorTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
changePassword.errorTimeout: Request timed out (15 s). Check your connection and try again.
changePassword.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
changePassword.errorGeneric: Error changing password. Please try again.
changePassword.zodLower: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
changePassword.zodUpper: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
changePassword.zodDigit: Must contain at least one digit
changePassword.zodSpecial: Must contain at least one special character

labCatalog.title: Test catalog
labCatalog.subtitle: Manage the tests your lab offers
labCatalog.emptyDesc: Add your first test to the catalog.

medicationCatalog.title: Medication Catalog
medicationCatalog.subtitle: National medication formulary (global reference)
medicationCatalog.heroHelper: Browse and search the national essential medicines list. Read-only reference data, shared across all clinics.

medicationCatalog.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No results} one {# result} other {# results}}
medicationCatalog.noResultsDesc: No medication matches your search or filters.
medicationCatalog.usageNotStocked: Not added to this clinic's stock

labOrders.title: Laboratory
labOrders.subtitle: Lab orders and results
labOrders.noCatalog: No active tests in the catalog.

pharmacy.inventoryEmptyDesc: Add catalog medications to your stock.
pharmacy.queueEmptyDesc: Active prescriptions will appear here once a doctor creates them.
pharmacy.heroHelper: Manage medicines to dispense, stock shortages and substitutions.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.description: This page isn't available offline. Check your connection and try again.

dashboard.title: Hello 👋
dashboard.subtitle: Dashboard — {clinic}
dashboard.onboardingStep: Step {step}/4 — Complete your profile, services and team to get started.
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Manage your clinic operations with ease.
dashboard.heroTagline: Manage your patients, appointments and consultations with ease.

patients.title: Patients
patients.subtitle: Manage your clinic's patient records
patients.errorDesc: An error occurred. Check your connection and try again.
patients.emptyDesc: Create your first patient record to get started.
patients.deleteConfirm: You are about to permanently delete {name}. This action is irreversible.
patients.createSubtitle: Enter the patient's information. Only the name is required.
patients.zodCniDuplicate: This CNI is already registered for another patient
patients.offlineDemographicsNote: Saved offline. Insurance and consent require a connection.
patients.smsOptInHint: The patient agrees to receive appointment reminders by SMS.
patients.softDeleteNote: Deletion is reversible: records are hidden, not erased. An admin can restore them.
patients.consentHint: The patient consented to the recording and processing of their medical data.

appointments.title: Appointments & Queue
appointments.cancelConfirm: Confirm cancellation? This action cannot be undone.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage invoices and payments
billing.onlinePaymentsDesc: Wave and Orange Money payments will be activated after the pilot program.
billing.zodShareExceedsTotal: Insurance share cannot exceed the total

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.subtitle: Statistics for the last 12 months
analytics.errorDesc: Check your connection or that migration 021 has been applied.

settings.title: Settings
settings.nineaHint: National business identification number — shown on invoices
settings.rcHint: Clinic RCCM number — shown on invoices
settings.smsRemindersHint: Automatically send reminders to patients who opted in to SMS.
settings.smsSenderHint: Short name shown as the sender (max 11 chars), if supported by the carrier.
settings.exportDesc: Export your clinic's data as CSV. Every export is logged.
settings.exportNote: Deleted records are excluded. Clinic admins only.

adminClinics.title: Clinic Management
adminClinics.subtitle: Super administrator view
adminClinics.archivedNotice: Archived clinics are hidden from the normal view. Historical data is preserved.
adminClinics.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.
adminClinics.archiveNote1: All users of this clinic will be deactivated
adminClinics.archiveNote3: The clinic will be hidden from the normal view but remains accessible in audit mode
adminClinics.archiveNote4: This action can be reversed via Supabase if necessary
adminClinics.tempPasswordWarning: This password will only be shown once. The admin must change it on first login.
adminClinics.adminNote: A temporary password will be generated. The admin must change it on first login.

adminRequests.title: Registration Requests
adminRequests.subtitle: Clinics awaiting approval
adminRequests.rejectConfirm: You are about to reject the request from {name}.
adminRequests.tempPasswordNote: Share with {email} via a secure channel (call, SMS, WhatsApp).
adminRequests.tempPasswordWarning: This password will no longer be shown after closing. The admin must change it on first login.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.tempPasswordNote: Share this password with {name} ({email}). The user must change it on next login.
adminUsers.tempPasswordWarning: This password will no longer be shown after closing.

adminBilling.title: Payments
adminBilling.subtitle: Global payments view — all clinics
adminBilling.aggregateNotice: Aggregate view only: for privacy, patient names and invoice-level details are not accessible to the super admin.
adminBilling.pilotNotice: Wave and Orange Money payments are not yet active. The payment_status and provider_ref columns will be populated after activation.

onboarding.title: Initial Setup
onboarding.subtitle: A few steps to get started
onboarding.skipLink: Skip setup and go to dashboard
onboarding.step1Desc: Complete the basic information about your establishment.
onboarding.step2Desc: List your services with their prices to simplify billing.
onboarding.step3Desc: Add doctors, nurses, and receptionists to your workspace.
onboarding.step4Desc: Everything is set up. You can start using CHMS.
onboarding.finishDesc: Profile, services, and team configured. You can now start registering patients and managing consultations.
